join_order.notes: Use sub/indexes/adsh_to_rowid.bin for adsh->rowid, then row-level sic and cik lookup. Sampled conditional survival after USD filter: 0.0779, estimated 2582997 num rows remain.
Probe the pre-built (tag,version) hash index and read tlabel. abstract=0 is effectively non-selective for this workload.

join_order.build: pre(filtered: stmt = eq_code, stored as compact_hash_map((adsh,tag,version) -> eq_count))
join_order.notes: Build from a sequential pre scan using stmt_zone_map pruning. Store multiplicity per triple to preserve 1:N semantics. Sampled output fanout after sub+tag: 0.2756 joined EQ rows per probe row, estimated 711799 joined rows.

data_structures.dim_filter: direct_array(sub/indexes/adsh_to_rowid.bin) plus row-level reads of sub.sic and sub.cik
data_structures.fact_join: pre-built tag_version_hash for (tag,version) and runtime compact_hash_map keyed by (adsh,tag,version) with uint16 eq_count payload
data_structures.aggregation: thread-local compact_hash_map keyed by (sic,tlabel,stmt_code) with values {sum_value,count_rows,distinct_cik_hash_set}

parallelism.build_phase: parallel scan of pre stmt-eligible blocks into thread-local pre_eq_count_hash partitions, then merge
parallelism.probe_phase: parallel scan of num blocks surviving uom_zone_map; probe sub lookup, tag hash, and pre_eq_count_hash; aggregate into thread-local group-by state

indexes.purpose: skip num blocks whose uom range cannot contain usd_code
direct adsh lookup for sub rowid before sic/cik reads
join lookup from (num.tag,num.version) to tag rowid and tlabel
prune pre blocks before building the filtered EQ hash table
